---
title: "WRDS- S&P Global ESG Scores"
page-layout: article
---

# WRDS- S&P Global ESG Scores

**Provider:** WRDS

## Description

WRDS dataset containing S&P ESG scores, Trucost environmental data, and climate analytics. Supports research on corporate sustainability, environmental impact, and climate risk.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Energy & Environment
- **Data/resource type:** ESG & Sustainability Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** WRDS Account Required, Individual Account Required
- **Displayed topic:** ESG & Sustainability Data, Data Platform

## Access notes

An individual WRDS account is required to access this data.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://wrds-www.wharton.upenn.edu/)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
